summary: Experienced ETL Data Engineer with over 5 years in designing, building, and optimizing data pipelines for enterprise data warehouses. Proficient in Azure Data Factory, SQL Server, Python, and data modeling, with a proven track record in transforming complex data sources. Successfully automated competitive analysis processes using NLP, reducing manual analysis time by 65%, to deliver near real-time market intelligence and drive strategic decision-making.

education.degree: Master of Science, Analytics and Data Science

responsibilities: Spearhead data ingestion workflows for pricing and product performance, leveraging SQL and Python to analyze A/B test results and present revenue impact projections, directly influencing strategic pricing decisions.

Design and maintain robust data models and Power BI dashboards that track product performance, pricing effectiveness, and customer behavior trends, supporting weekly analysis by Product and Commercial teams to identify optimization opportunities.

Construct end-to-end ETL data pipelines, integrating web-scraped and internal sources, with SQL data modeling to facilitate competitive pricing analysis and support downstream machine learning models.

Automate product comparison and competitive analysis processes utilizing a BERT-based NLP pipeline, reducing manual analysis time by 65% and delivering near real-time market intelligence to Product teams.
Refine MySQL queries and indexing strategies, enhancing dashboard refresh speed by 40% and accelerating exploratory data analysis for business stakeholders.

Collaborated with Operations and Inventory leadership to define key performance indicators and constructed automated Power BI dashboards, tracking weekly business performance trends to enable metrics-driven decision-making.

Engineered and implemented ETL processes utilizing Azure Data Factory to integrate diverse on-premises and third-party data sources, improving data quality by 30% and standardizing reporting enterprise-wide.

Developed predictive inventory and waste reduction models using Linear Regression and Random Forest, improving stock accuracy by 12–18% and reducing operational waste by 25% through validated impact analysis.

Translated complex business requirements into robust SQL, Python, and Power BI solutions, collaborating with Product, Data Science, and Operations teams to ensure precise alignment with stakeholder needs.
Built distributed data pipelines using Apache Airflow, ingesting data into Azure Data Lake Storage and Synapse Analytics to support near real-time analytics and reporting capabilities.
Enabled faster decision-making by creating Power BI dashboards connected to Azure SQL Data Warehouse, visualizing key operational and system KPIs for executive insights.
Orchestrated collaboration with engineering and analytics teams, translating complex data and reporting requirements into scalable data models and robust ETL pipelines.
Formulated and implemented SQL-based ETL workflows to integrate multi-platform marketing data, enforcing data governance and compliance to enhance data quality for analytics.
Created Tableau and Power BI dashboards for monitoring marketing spending and performance, identifying optimization opportunities that reduced ad spending by 30%.
Partnered with marketing stakeholders to surface critical insights and recommendations, increasing the effectiveness of data-driven decision-making.

projects.title: Amazon Product Suggestion
description: Engineered a product suggestion API using Python and FastAPI, processing product data with BERT NER and HuggingFace to identify relevant recommendations.
Implemented web scraping functionalities with Playwright to extract and clean product data from Amazon, ensuring data freshness for daily analysis.
Achieved a product suggestion accuracy of 85% by fine-tuning BERT models, enhancing user experience and engagement by an estimated 15%.

projects.title: Newspaper Delivery System
description: Developed a robust Newspaper Delivery System using Python, integrating PostgreSQL for efficient subscriber data management and delivery route optimization.
Automated email notifications via SMTP and IMAP for delivery confirmations and service updates, improving customer communication efficiency by 20%.
Implemented Playwright for automated testing of system functionalities, reducing manual testing time by 40% and ensuring system reliability.

projects.title: LAPD Crime Stats Dashboard
description: Created an interactive LAPD Crime Statistics Dashboard using Tableau, providing visual insights into crime trends across different districts and timeframes.
Performed extensive data cleaning and transformation on raw crime datasets, improving data accuracy by 25% for reliable analytical reporting.
Enabled public access to critical crime data via Tableau Public, empowering community stakeholders with data-driven insights for local safety initiatives.
